inputs.titre: Mort de Madame de La Fayette

reason: The image depicts an elderly woman, presumably Madame de La Fayette, seated in a chair surrounded by books and lit by candlelight. Her dress and the architecture of the room suggest a historical setting appropriate for the late 17th century. However, the quality of the candles and the precision of the clothing and books suggest a modern creation. The books also appear in too good of condition.
